stories.headline: Mark Lamarr gets driving ban despite hardship plea
stories.summary: The comedian, 57, is banned from driving after being caught speeding in Twickenham.

stories.headline: ImmunityBio Anktiva cancer claims: FDA flags Patrick Soon-Shiong's comments
stories.summary: Federal health officials have issued a warning about controversial statements made by biotech billionaire Dr. Patrick Soon-Shiong about one of his company's cancer drugs. Soon-Shiong recently told podcast listeners that his company’s bladder cancer drug may b…

stories.headline: Minnesota officials sue Trump administration over shooting deaths
stories.summary: Minnesota officials have filed a federal lawsuit accusing the Trump administration of withholding evidence related to three shootings by federal officers, including the shooting deaths of Renee Good and Alex Pretti. The lawsuit filed Tuesday claims that the f…

stories.headline: Ukraine Unesco site damaged as Russia launches 400 drones in deadly daytime attack
stories.summary: Cities across the west of Ukraine were hit, with residential buildings damaged and many injured.

stories.headline: Reeves plans energy bill help for those 'who need it most'
stories.summary: The US-Israel war with Iran is having an impact on costs domestically, with oil and gas prices soaring.

stories.headline: What to know about Cypriot concern over UK's military bases
stories.summary: Cyprus has raised concerns that it was kept in the dark when a Shahed drone struck a hangar at a British air base on the island’s southern coastline minutes after midnight on March 2. While sirens had already been blaring at RAF Akrotiri warning personnel to …

stories.headline: Son learned of Nottingham attacks victim's death through Instagram
stories.summary: Ian Coates, 65, was stabbed to death by Valdo Calocane in the early hours of 13 June 2023.

stories.headline: Philippine president declares national energy emergency
stories.summary: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has declared a state of national energy emergency to respond to the impact of the Middle East war, which his administration said poses “an imminent danger of a critically low energy supply.” Under the declaration, whi…

stories.headline: Swansea shopkeeper gets £100 years after student stole sign
stories.summary: The former student admitted stealing the sign after "a night of drinking".

stories.headline: Transgender girls told to leave Girlguiding groups by September
stories.summary: It follows an announcement in December that transgender members would be banned from joining.
